debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
h₀ : 4 ≤ n
⊢ n ^ 2 ≤ n.factorial

proof:
refine Nat.le_induction ?_ ?_ n h₀
  · norm_num
  · intro k hk ih
    rw [factorial_succ]
    calc (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := by gcongr
failed_attempts:
induction h₀ with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, sq]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    apply le_trans _ ih
    nlinarith

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    calc (n + 1) ^ 2
      _ = (n + 1) * (n + 1) := by ring
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2   := by gcongr; nlinarith
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n !     := by gcongr; exact ih
      _ = (n + 1) !         := by rw [factorial_succ]

induction h₀ with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_two, mul_le_mul_left (Nat.succ_pos k)]
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) ih

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | succ n hn ih =>
    calc (n + 1) ^ 2
      _ = (n + 1) * (n + 1) := pow_two _
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2   := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ (by nlinarith)
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n !     := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ ih
      _ = (n + 1) !         := (factorial_succ n).symm

induction h₀ with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hle ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, succ_eq_add_one]
    calc
      (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := by gcongr

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk IH =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) IH

induction' h₀ with k hk ih
  · norm_num
  · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, sq]
    calc (k + 1) * (k + 1)
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k !   := by gcongr

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, sq]
    gcongr
    apply le_trans _ ih
    rw [sq]
    nlinarith

induction' h₀ with k hk IH
  · norm_num
  · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, pow_two, mul_le_mul_left (Nat.succ_pos k)]
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) IH

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, sq]
    exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ (le_trans (by nlinarith) ih)

induction h₀ with
  | refl => norm_num
  | step h ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, pow_two, pow_two]
    gcongr
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) ih

induction h₀ with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    calc
      k + 1 ≤ k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ k ! := ih

induction n, h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | succ k hk IH =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, sq, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
    calc (k + 1) * (k + 1)
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k !   := by gcongr

induction' h₀ with k hk IH
  · norm_num
  · rw [factorial_succ, pow_two, mul_le_mul_left (succ_pos _)]
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) IH

induction' h₀ with k hk IH
  · norm_num
  · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, sq (k + 1), mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_left k.succ_pos]
    nlinarith

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, pow_two]
    gcongr
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) ih

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, pow_two, mul_le_mul_left (succ_pos n)]
    calc
      n + 1 ≤ 2 * n := by linarith
      _ ≤ n * n     := Nat.mul_le_mul_right n (by linarith)
      _ ≤ n !       := ih

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_two]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    rw [pow_two] at ih
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) ih

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, pow_two (n + 1)]
    apply Nat.mul_le_mul_left
    trans n ^ 2
    · nlinarith
    · exact ih

induction h₀ with
  | refl => norm_num
  | step k hk IH =>
    rw [factorial_succ, pow_two, mul_le_mul_left (succ_pos k)]
    apply le_trans _ IH
    nlinarith

induction' h₀ with k hk IH
  · norm_num
  · rw [factorial_succ, pow_two (k + 1), mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_left k.succ_pos]
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) IH

induction' h₀ with k hk IH
  · norm_num
  · rw [factorial_succ, sq]
    apply mul_le_mul_left
    calc
      k + 1 ≤ k * k := by nlinarith
      _     = k ^ 2 := by ring
      _     ≤ k !   := IH

induction n, h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, sq, mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_left (Nat.succ_pos _)]
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) ih

induction h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk IH =>
    rw [factorial_succ, pow_two, pow_two]
    exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left (k + 1) (le_trans (by nlinarith) IH)

induction h₀ with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk IH =>
    rw [factorial_succ, sq]
    apply mul_le_mul_left
    calc
      k + 1 ≤ k * k := by nlinarith [hk]
      _ ≤ k ! := by rw [← sq]; exact IH

induction h₀ with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
    calc (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := by gcongr

induction h₀ with
  | refl => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, pow_two]
    exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ (le_trans (by nlinarith) ih)

induction h₀ with
  | base => norm_num
  | step k hk ih =>
    rw [factorial_succ, sq, mul_le_mul_iff_of_pos_left k.succ_pos]
    exact le_trans (by nlinarith) ih

induction h₀ with
  | refl => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ]
    calc (n + 1) ^ 2
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n !   := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ ih

induction h₀ with
  | base => norm_num
  | step n hn ih =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, sq (n + 1), mul_le_mul_left (Nat.succ_pos _)]
    apply le_trans _ ih
    nlinarith
successful_attempts:
refine Nat.le_induction ?_ ?_ n h₀
  · norm_num
  · intro k hk ih
    rw [factorial_succ]
    calc (k + 1) ^ 2 ≤ (k + 1) * k ^ 2 := by nlinarith
      _ ≤ (k + 1) * k ! := by gcongr

induction n, h₀ using Nat.le_induction with
  | base => norm_num
  | succ n hn ih =>
    have : n + 1 ≤ n ^ 2 := calc
      n + 1 ≤ 2 * n := by linarith
      _     ≤ n * n := Nat.mul_le_mul_right n (by linarith)
      _     = n ^ 2 := by ring
    calc (n + 1) ^ 2
      _ = (n + 1) * (n + 1) := by ring
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n ^ 2   := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ this
      _ ≤ (n + 1) * n !     := Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ ih
      _ = (n + 1)!          := rfl
